message:
🌱 Replace namespace imports with named imports in test files (#10814)

* 🌱 Replace namespace imports with named imports in test files

Replace `import * as fs` and `import * as path` with named imports
across 8 test files for better tree-shaking and explicitness.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>

* 🌱 Standardize violet color references to purple for consistency

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>

* 🐛 Fix basename variable shadowing imported basename function

Rename local 'basename' variables to 'base' to avoid TDZ error
when the named import 'basename' from node:path is shadowed.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
